name: Aisne (France)
description: The composite arms of the département of Aisne on a white field: a bendy gold-and-blue device at the chief, a wavy blue band, and an ornamented gold band — drawn from the historic provinces (Île-de-France, Champagne, Picardy) that meet in the department.
history: The département of Aisne was assembled from parts of several historic provinces, whose emblems are combined in its arms.

features.role: composite charges (bendy gold-and-blue, a wavy blue band, an ornamented gold band) for the historic provinces of the Aisne
